title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 13: The Way of Heaven
description: Chapter 13 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 13 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: The Way of heaven is to revolve and never accumulate. Therefore the ten thousand things are brought to perfection. The Way of the emperors is to revolve and never accumulate. Therefore the whole world goes home to him.
